text.title: RAG Bench Harness Template Worked Example
text.summary: Worked example: chunking-bench on Faion KB snapshot, 50k docs, 800 gold-labeled queries.

section.title: Worked example
section.p: Team: Faion ML-engineering. Task: weekly chunking-strategy bench on Faion KB.
Step 1. Corpus snapshot at `warehouse://kb_snapshot_2026q2` (50000 docs, sha a1b2c3d4e5f).
Step 2. Query set committed at `git://faion/eval/queries-2026q2.jsonl` (800 queries, each with 1-5 gold doc ids).
Step 4. Metrics: Recall@10 + MRR (retrieval) + faithfulness (generation downstream).
Result. Spec committed. Bench runner consumes spec → emits leaderboard at `git://faion/leaderboards/rag-2026q2.json`.
